findings.title: Gob Deserialization of Untrusted Pipeline Import
findings.description: User-supplied base64 payload deserialized with gob.NewDecoder().Decode() with registered interface types enabling potential DoS and type confusion

findings.title: Gob Deserialization in Object Store Retrieval
findings.description: Object store retrieval deserializes potentially tampered gob-encoded data across two separate endpoints without integrity verification

findings.title: Remote Plugin Download and Loading
findings.description: Plugin endpoint downloads shared object from user-supplied URL and loads it via plugin.Open() enabling arbitrary code execution through init functions

findings.title: Shell Command Injection via Script Execution
findings.description: Script execution endpoint passes user-supplied input directly to exec.Command with sh -c enabling arbitrary shell command execution
